scripts.build:package: pnpm --filter @upup/core run build && pnpm --filter @upup/server run build && pnpm --filter @upup/react run build && pnpm --filter @upup/vue run build && pnpm --filter @upup/svelte run build && pnpm --filter @upup/vanilla run build && pnpm --filter @upup/angular run build && pnpm --filter @upup/preact run build && pnpm --filter @upup/next run build
scripts.dev: dotenv -e local-dev/.env.ports -- concurrently "pnpm run dev:apps" "pnpm run dev:package-watch"
scripts.dev:storybook: concurrently "pnpm --filter @upup/storybook-vue storybook" "pnpm --filter @upup/storybook-react storybook" "pnpm --filter @upup/storybook-svelte storybook" "pnpm --filter @upup/storybook-vanilla storybook" "pnpm --filter @upup/storybook-angular storybook"
scripts.dev:package-watch: pnpm --filter @upup/core run build && concurrently "pnpm --filter @upup/core run dev" "pnpm --filter @upup/server run dev" "pnpm --filter @upup/react run dev"
scripts.start: pnpm run docs:build && pnpm --filter @upup/landing run start
scripts.e2e: turbo run build && pnpm --filter e2e-test test:e2e && dotenv -e local-dev/.env.minio -- pnpm --filter e2e-test test:e2e:cf
scripts.e2e:minio:test: dotenv -e local-dev/.env.minio -- pnpm --filter @upup/server exec vitest run tests/integration
scripts.release: pnpm --filter @upup/core run release && pnpm --filter @upup/server run release && pnpm --filter @upup/react run release && pnpm --filter @upup/vue run release && pnpm --filter @upup/svelte run release && pnpm --filter @upup/vanilla run release && pnpm --filter @upup/angular run release && pnpm --filter @upup/preact run release && pnpm --filter @upup/next run release
scripts.test-release: pnpm --filter @upup/core run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/server run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/react run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/vue run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/svelte run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/vanilla run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/angular run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/preact run test-release && pnpm --filter @upup/next run test-release
